segments.segment: SYSTEM MAP — overall architecture of the French national curriculum (cycles, socle commun, legal chain, horaires, authoritative indexes)
subjects: sciences de la vie et de la Terre (SVT)
segments.coverage_assessment: The overall architecture is fully reconstructable: the 4-cycle structure (cycle 1 maternelle PS/MS/GS; cycle 2 CP/CE1/CE2; cycle 3 CM1/CM2/6e; cycle 4 5e/4e/3e) plus lycée GT (2nde + cycle terminal 1re/Tle) is confirmed, the socle commun (décret 2015-372, 5 domaines / 8 composantes) is captured with both legal and pedagogical sources, the legal chain arrêté→BOEN→éduscol is documented with concrete examples, and official horaires exist for every level (arrêtés 2015 école, 2015 collège, 2018 lycée). The single authoritative index lives in the éduscol 'J'enseigne au cycle X' portals plus the repères/attendus hub (6910); the in-force français/maths reform is pinned to exact arrêtés with phased application dates (cycle 1&2 rentrée 2025, cycle 3 2025/2026 split, cycle 4 2026).
gaps: éduscol.education.gouv.fr and eduscol.education.fr frequently return HTTP 403 to automated fetchers — index/portal page contents were enumerated via search snippets, not direct fetch; downstream harvesting of the per-subject PDF links behind these portals should use a browser/MCP fetch or académie mirrors.

Cycle 1 (école maternelle) has a global programme d'enseignement (arrêté covering all 5 domaines d'apprentissage, not just français/maths) whose current full-programme reference was not separately pinned here — the maternelle index and the 2024 français/maths overlay are captured, but the consolidated maternelle programme arrêté (updated for rentrée 2025) should be confirmed by the cycle-1 researcher.
Collège horaires arrêté (MENE1511223A) has at least one later modification (MENE1717553A, 2017); the exact current consolidated grid should be verified rather than assumed from the 2015 base text.
Cycle 4 français/maths arrêté (MENE2602912A, BOEN 2026) per-level application calendar (which of 5e/4e/3e apply in 2026 vs 2027) needs confirmation from the arrêté body.

Lycée GT programmes derive from many separate per-subject arrêtés (réforme 2019); this system-map segment lists the horaires and the portal but not each subject programme arrêté — that enumeration belongs to the lycée researcher.

Histoire-géographie cycle 2/3 is under its own phased reform (new HG programme cycle 2 from rentrée 2026-2027 at CP, 2027-2028 at CE1/CE2 per search snippet) — flagged for the relevant cycle researcher to pin the exact arrêté.

documents.title: Le socle commun de connaissances, de compétences et de culture (portail éduscol)
documents.granularity: prose framework organized in 5 domaines; underlying décret enumerates 8 composantes évaluées en fin de cycle — semi-enumerable (5 domains + 8 components), not per-subject attendus
documents.bo_reference: Décret n° 2015-372 du 31 mars 2015; référentiel BO n°17 du 23 avril 2015
documents.notes: Overarching competency frame for the entire scolarité obligatoire (cycles 2-4). 5 domaines: 1) Les langages pour penser et communiquer; 2) Les méthodes et outils pour apprendre; 3) La formation de la personne et du citoyen; 4) Les systèmes naturels et les systèmes techniques; 5) Les représentations du monde et l'activité humaine. Domain 1 has 4 sub-components → 8 composantes total, each evaluated at end of each cycle. Root for cross-mapping cycle programmes to competencies.

documents.bo_reference: JORF n°0078 du 2 avril 2015; codified Code de l'éducation art. D.122-1 et annexe
documents.notes: Legal anchor of the socle. Illustrates the legal chain: décret/arrêté (Légifrance/JORF) → publication au Bulletin officiel (BOEN) → version consolidée pédagogique sur éduscol.

segments.segment: CYCLE 1 — École maternelle (PS, MS, GS), ages 3-6
subjects: Mobiliser le langage dans toutes ses dimensions / Développement et structuration du langage oral et écrit
Agir, s'exprimer, comprendre à travers l'activité physique (activités physiques)
Agir, s'exprimer, comprendre à travers les activités artistiques
Explorer le monde (temps, espace, vivant, matière, objets)
Éducation à la vie affective et relationnelle (EVAR) — from 2026
segments.coverage_assessment: The full official cycle 1 curriculum IS reconstructable for both applicable versions. For rentrée 2025 (current year): the 2021 consolidated programme PDF (5 domaines, prose + a fully enumerable end-of-cycle 'attendus de fin d'école maternelle' list) plus the two 2024 revision annexes (langage + premiers outils mathématiques, BO n°41) that replace domaines 1 and 4. For rentrée 2026: the brand-new complete programme (arrêté 16 avril 2026, BO n°19, 6 domaines + EVAR) with age-banded 'exemples de réussite'. All arrêté references, BO numbers, Légifrance ID and direct PDF URLs are captured.
gaps: education.gouv.fr and eduscol.education.gouv.fr return HTTP 403 to automated WebFetch; the direct PDF URLs are valid but were verified via search/mirror pages and curl, not by fetching education.gouv HTML directly. Confirm each PDF opens and matches the stated BO reference before ingesting.
The 2026 EVAR maternelle programme PDF direct URL was not isolated (only the umbrella BO n°19 page). Locate the dedicated EVAR annexe PDF.
The 2026 full programme's exact internal structure (whether it emits per-age competencies as clean discrete items vs prose paragraphs) needs confirmation by parsing annexe-...-516107.pdf directly.

The 'socle commun de connaissances, de compétences et de culture' does NOT apply to cycle 1 (it covers the scolarité obligatoire, cycles 2-4, from CP). No socle document belongs to this segment — cycle 1 has only its own programme + attendus.

Éduscol 'repères annuels de progression' (a formal per-year document family) do NOT exist for cycle 1 the way they do for cycles 2-3; maternelle uses end-of-cycle attendus (2021) then per-age exemples de réussite (2026). Accompagnement 'livrets' langage/mathématiques exist as pedagogical resources, not normative programme text.
The 2024 langage & maths annexe PDFs (403812 / 403815) may themselves be superseded by the 2026 programme's domaine 1 & 2 text; verify which version to treat as canonical per target rentrée.

segments.segment: CYCLE 2 — CP, CE1, CE2 (cycle des apprentissages fondamentaux, ages 6-9)
subjects: Questionner le monde (→ Sciences et technologie à partir de 2026)
segments.coverage_assessment: The full official Cycle 2 curriculum can be reconstructed for the two core subjects (français, mathématiques) at high, per-level granularity from the 2024 arrêté annexe PDFs (403818, 403821), which are directly downloadable and contain enumerable attendus de fin d'année and connaissances/compétences. The non-core subjects (EPS, enseignements artistiques, questionner le monde, LVE) are reconstructible for the in-force rentrée-2025 state from the consolidated 2015/2020 cycle 2 arrêté (MENE1526483A), plus their 2026 successor arrêtés (LVE MENE2602911A, EPS MENE2608631A, sciences et technologie MENE2611650A) which are entering force progressively (CP 2026, CE1/CE2 2027). EMC is covered by the 2024 arrêté (phased CP2024/CE1 2025/CE2 2026). The socle commun provides the framework layer. Main obstacle: education.gouv.fr and eduscol.education.gouv.fr return HTTP 403 to automated fetching, so annexe PDFs must be pulled via the /sites/default/files or /media/{id}/download and eduscol /document/{id}/download endpoints rather than by scraping the HTML index pages.
gaps: education.gouv.fr /bo/ pages and eduscol.education.gouv.fr all return HTTP 403 to WebFetch; the éduscol HTML index pages (enseigner-au-cycle-2, /6910 attendus, per-subject ressources) could not be enumerated directly — the exhaustive per-subject PDF/download-ID inventory needs a browser or the raw download endpoints.
Exact BO article slug for the 2024 EMC arrêté (MENE24xxxxxA in BO n°24/2024) not verified; Légifrance JORFTEXT000049694961 is the authoritative fallback.

Direct annexe PDF URLs for the 2026 arrêtés (LVE cycle 2 confirmed = 481187.pdf; EPS and sciences-et-technologie cycle 2 annexe PDF filenames not captured) still need collection from the BO index pages.

Whether the standalone 2019 éduscol 'attendus de fin d'année / repères annuels' documents for français & maths are still published or fully replaced by the per-level 2025 programmes is unresolved (the 403 blocked confirmation on the live /6910 page).

Enseignements artistiques cycle 2: only a DRAFT (projet CSP, juillet 2025) exists for a rewrite planned rentrée 2027; the 2015/2020 programme remains the sole in-force text and no successor arrêté is published yet.

segments.coverage_assessment: The full official cycle 3 curriculum can be reconstructed, but only by assembling documents across a live transition: cycle 3 is mid-reform in 2025-2027, so several subjects have DIFFERENT in-force arrêtés depending on the level (CM1 vs CM2 vs 6e). Français and mathématiques (2025 reform, BO n°16) and their attendus/exemples de réussite are fully captured with direct PDFs and are highly extractable at per-level, per-domain granularity. All other subjects are covered via the canonical éduscol index (page 4356), the consolidated 2020/2023 cycle 3 PDF (still authoritative for arts and for CM2/6e in HG/EPS/LV/sciences), the socle commun decree, and the repères/attendus page — though several 2026 reform arrêtés still need their direct PDF links captured.
gaps: Direct arrêté URLs and annexe PDF links for the 2026 reform programmes are not yet captured: sciences et technologie (BO n°24 du 11 juin 2026, CM1), EPS + histoire-géographie (BO n°22 du 28 mai 2026, arrêté MENE2608631A, CM1), langues vivantes étrangères/régionales (BO n°12 du 19 mars 2026, CM1). Follow-up: fetch education.gouv.fr/bo/2026 Hebdo pages.

The 6e LV étrangères programme (BO n°22 du 29 mai 2025) and 6e LV régionales (BO n°21 du 21 mai 2026) need arrêté NOR + PDF; LV is the most level-fragmented subject (4 distinct BO references across CM1/CM2/6e).

The standalone 'attendus de fin d'année' PDFs on page 6910 (fin de CM1/CM2/6e) are the 2019-origin versions tied to the 2020/2023 programmes; for CM1 and 6e français/maths the authoritative attendus are now embedded inside the 2025 reform programmes. Extraction must not double-source — prefer the 2025 programme PDFs for CM1/6e français-maths.
Direct PDFs for EMC 2024 (BO n°24) and EVAR/EVARS 2025 (BO n°6) not individually captured — only referenced via the éduscol index; fetch the two BO arrêtés for annexe PDFs.
Whether a rénovation of the socle commun (announced as 'en cours') publishes before rentrée 2026 is unconfirmed; current decree 2015-372 remains in force.
Optional 'Français et culture antique' (FCA, enseignement facultatif de 6e) programme reference/PDF not captured — low priority but part of the 6e offer.

segments.coverage_assessment: The full official cycle-4 curriculum can be reconstructed. The consolidated master programme (arrêté 2015 modifié, version rentrée 2020, eduscol doc 621) enumerates per-discipline competencies and end-of-cycle attendus for EVERY subject, and is overlaid by three targeted replacements now in force or entering force: technologie (2024), EMC (2024), and français+maths (2026, progressive from 5e at rentrée 2026). Per-grade granularity for français, maths, LV and EMC comes from the attendus de fin d'année / repères annuels (BO 2019). The socle commun gives the top-level competency framework and the DNB note gives the 3e assessment frame. Together these are enough to build a structured JSON taxonomy, though extraction must track version overlays carefully (which text governs which grade in a given rentrée).
gaps: EMI (éducation aux médias et à l'information) has no standalone in-force programme document — its competencies must be aggregated from the EMC 2024 programme, disciplinary programmes and the socle.

Per-grade attendus de fin d'année exist only for français, maths, LV and EMC. Physique-chimie, SVT, histoire-géographie, arts plastiques, éducation musicale, histoire des arts and EPS have only END-OF-CYCLE attendus in the master programme — no per-year breakdown.

Version overlay complexity: for a given rentrée, different grades follow different texts (e.g. rentrée 2026 — 5e on new français/maths 2026 + new technologie + new EMC; 4e/3e on 2020 programme for français/maths). A taxonomy must model 'applicable version by (subject, grade, rentrée)' rather than one static programme per subject.

Several canonical eduscol/education.gouv pages are behind Cloudflare and returned HTTP 403 to direct fetch; PDF direct-download links were confirmed via search but a few (EMC 2024 annexe, EVARS annexe, socle) were not captured as exact /document/{id}/download URLs and need one more resolution pass.

The new français/maths 2026 programmes (BO n°10, 5 mars 2026) are published but NOT yet applied at rentrée 2025; for a 2025-2026 snapshot they must be flagged as future-dated, while for 2026-2027 they govern 5e only.

segments.segment: Seconde générale et technologique (lycée GT, age 15-16) — tronc commun + enseignements optionnels
subjects: Langues vivantes A et B (étrangères et régionales)
Sciences de la vie et de la Terre (SVT)
Optionnels artistiques (arts plastiques, éducation musicale, théâtre, danse, cinéma-audiovisuel, histoire des arts, arts du cirque)

Optionnels scientifiques et technologiques (sciences de l'ingénieur, création et innovation technologiques, sciences et laboratoire, biotechnologies, santé et social, management et gestion, écologie-agronomie-territoires-développement durable)
segments.coverage_assessment: Yes, the full official curriculum for Seconde GT tronc commun is reconstructible from these documents: every common subject has a canonical éduscol pivot page plus a downloadable in-force PDF and a Bulletin officiel reference. The core scientific/technical subjects (maths, physique-chimie, SVT, SES, SNT) contain highly enumerable 'Contenus / Capacités attendues' tables ideal for atomic extraction; français, histoire-géographie, EMC and languages are more thematic/prose with listed objets d'étude and CECRL descriptors. Three post-2019 reforms are captured with their exact effective dates: EMC (new BO 13 June 2024, already in force in seconde), langues vivantes étrangères (new BO 29 May 2025, in force in seconde since rentrée 2025), and mathematics (new BO 2 April 2026, in force in seconde from rentrée 2026-2027) — so both the 2025-in-force and 2026-incoming versions are documented.
gaps: education.gouv.fr BO pages (e.g. the 2 April 2026 maths arrêté MENE2602914A) return HTTP 403 to automated fetchers; URLs are canonical and verified via éduscol but direct machine crawl needs a browser/User-Agent workaround or the éduscol-hosted PDF mirror.

Exact stable direct-PDF URLs for français, maths (2019), SES, SNT, EPS, EMC, arts and the new 2025/2026 programmes were not all captured as literal href strings — they are served via éduscol 'document/download' links whose numeric IDs need one extra fetch per file to resolve (physique-chimie, SVT, histoire-géo, CIT/SI PDFs ARE captured as literal URLs).

The 'socle commun de connaissances, de compétences et de culture' is a collège-level framework (mastery assessed end of cycle 4); it is NOT a lycée/seconde document — for this segment it only appears as a reference the seconde is meant to consolidate, so no seconde-specific socle document exists.

'Attendus de fin d'année' and 'repères annuels de progression' are primary/collège (cycles 1-4) instruments and do NOT exist for the lycée; at seconde the equivalent granularity is the 'capacités attendues/exigibles' embedded in each subject programme (already captured).

Not every one of the ~15+ optional enseignements was enumerated with its own row (each artistic discipline and each technological optional has a separate éduscol pivot page + 2019 arrêté); arts plastiques, LCA and CIT/SI are given as representative exemplars with a note that siblings follow the same BO spécial n°1 du 22 janvier 2019.

Seconde spécifique STHR (sciences et technologies de l'hôtellerie et restauration) has its own distinct programmes (e.g. maths STHR, BO 2019) and is only partially noted here since the task targets seconde GT tronc commun.

segments.coverage_assessment: Yes — the full official tronc-commun curriculum for Première + Terminale voie générale can be reconstructed from these documents. Every subject is covered by a canonical Bulletin officiel arrêté whose HTML page (education.gouv.fr/bo/...) and Légifrance twin contain the complete enumerable content (objets d'étude, notions, thèmes/chapitres, savoirs/savoir-faire, capacités attendues, champs d'apprentissage, CECRL descriptors). The reform state for rentrée 2025 is clean: the 2019 programmes (with 2022-2023 maths updates) remain in force in 1re/Tle, with confirmed successors only for LV (rentrée 2026) and EMC (already in Première, Terminale in 2026).
gaps: eduscol.education.gouv.fr HTML and cache.media PDF programme pages return HTTP 403 to automated fetch; direct éduscol PDF download URLs were not captured. The full text is nonetheless available on the education.gouv.fr/bo/*.htm canonical pages and on Légifrance, and académie mirrors (ac-* sites) host identical PDFs.

2026 successor programmes for Première/Terminale voie générale are only CONFIRMED for langues vivantes (arrêté 5 mai 2025) and EMC (arrêté 29 mai 2024). The government notice states new programmes enter 1re/Tle at rentrée 2026 — whether français (1re), philosophie, histoire-géographie, enseignement scientifique, EPS and maths also get 2026 revisions was not confirmed in this pass; check for arrêtés published late 2025 / 2026.
The 'new français/maths programmes announced 2024-2025' cited in the brief concern cycles 1-2 (primary/collège), NOT this lycée segment; no impact on 1re/Tle tronc commun for rentrée 2025.

Terminale mathématiques 'complémentaires' and 'expertes' are OPTIONS (enseignements optionnels), not tronc commun, so excluded per scope — but flagged: the only tronc-commun maths is the Première 1h30 integrated programme (MENE2218178A). Terminale common curriculum contains no mathematics.
The exact NOR reference of the 2019 lycée EMC arrêté (still in force in Terminale until rentrée 2026) was not pinned; it is within BO spécial n°1 du 22 janvier 2019.

Distinct bac EXAM programme documents (définitions d'épreuves + programmes limitatifs) exist per subject and are separate from teaching programmes; only the français national œuvres programme was captured here. HG, enseignement scientifique, LV etc. each have separate épreuve definitions worth a dedicated pass.

Français Première has both the standing teaching programme (MENE1901575A) and a yearly-renewed programme national d'œuvres (note de service); the precise 2025-2026 (session 2026) note-de-service reference is distinct from the 2026-2027 one (MENE2518792N) and should be pulled separately for the exact session-2026 works list.

The document's official title is 'Programme national d'oeuvres pour l'enseignement de français pour l'année scolaire 2026-2027' (BO n°30 du 24 juillet 2025) — i.e. the works for Première in 2026-2027 (épreuve June 2027), NOT 'session 2026 / année scolaire 2025-2026' as claimed. The claim conflates it with the separate, now-past session-2026 PDF (baccalaureat-general-2026-francais-epreuve-anticipee-516893.pdf), which is a different document for a different year. segments.segment: Enseignements de spécialité, voie générale, cycle terminal (Première et Terminale) — les 13 spécialités
subjects: Sciences de la vie et de la Terre (SVT)
Langues, littératures et cultures étrangères et régionales (LLCER)
Littérature, langues et cultures de l'Antiquité (LCA)
Arts (arts plastiques, cinéma-audiovisuel, danse, histoire des arts, musique, théâtre, arts du cirque)
Éducation physique, pratiques et culture sportives (EPPCS)
segments.coverage_assessment: Full official curriculum for all 13 spécialités can be reconstructed for both Première and Terminale: every programme is fixed by a dated arrêté with a canonical BO/Légifrance HTML page and, for most, an éduscol annexe PDF. The core scientific spécialités (maths, PC, SVT, NSI, SI, biologie-écologie) enumerate notions/capacités in extractable table form; the literary/social ones (HGGSP, HLP, LLCER, LCA, SES, arts) are organised into enumerable thèmes/axes/objets d'étude but the content within is prose. All listed programmes are in force for rentrée 2025 and rentrée 2026; the only scheduled change is a new maths-terminale programme (arrêté 26-2-2026) that only applies from rentrée 2027-2028, so it does NOT affect 2025/2026.
gaps: Aucune spécialité du lycée ne dispose de documents séparés 'attendus de fin d'année' ni 'repères annuels de progression' — ces formats n'existent qu'aux cycles 2-3-4 (école/collège). Au lycée, les capacités/attendus sont intégrés dans le programme lui-même.

Les spécialités littéraires/artistiques (LLCER, LCA, arts) s'appuient sur des 'programmes limitatifs' d'œuvres publiés chaque année par note de service (ex. MENE2404047N pour LCA 2024-2026, arrêté 7-4-2025 pour histoire des arts). Ces listes annuelles ne sont pas incluses ici de façon exhaustive et devraient être collectées par année pour une réplication complète.

Le programme d'arts (MENE1901567A) est un arrêté unique regroupant 7 annexes disciplinaires (arts plastiques, cinéma-audiovisuel, danse, histoire des arts, musique, théâtre, arts du cirque); pour une extraction fine il faudra séparer chaque annexe.

Les URLs PDF directes n'ont été confirmées que pour une partie des spécialités (SVT première, HGGSP terminale, HLP première, SI première, biologie-écologie). Pour les autres, seule la page HTML BO est disponible; les PDF éduscol existent mais leurs URLs exactes restent à récupérer sur chaque page 'Programmes et ressources ... voie GT/G' d'éduscol.

Le nouveau programme de maths terminale (arrêté 26-2-2026, MENE2602919A) applicable rentrée 2027-2028 signale une réforme en cours: vérifier si des arrêtés analogues remplaçant d'autres spécialités en 2026 seront publiés pour la rentrée 2027, mais aucun n'affecte les rentrées 2025/2026.
Biologie-écologie relève d'un double pilotage Éducation nationale + Agriculture (publication BO-Agri); la page éduscol/education.gouv.fr n'héberge pas le référentiel, qui vit sur chlorofil.fr.

segments.segment: STRUCTURED / MACHINE-READABLE data hunt — already-digitized versions of the French national curriculum (programmes, socle commun, attendus, repères) in JSON/CSV/XML/RDF/dataset form
subjects: Toutes disciplines (référentiels transversaux: niveaux, disciplines, compétences)
segments.coverage_assessment: The FULL official curriculum content (enumerated attendus, repères, programme prose) CANNOT be reconstructed from already-structured sources alone — no one, including the ministry, has published the programme content itself as JSON/CSV. What DOES exist in clean machine-readable form is the TAXONOMY SKELETON: ScoLOMFR (SKOS/RDF, v11.0/2025, on GitLab, official, maintained) plus the BCN code lists give authoritative structured vocabularies for cycles, niveaux, disciplines and competency labels — the exact scaffold an os-taxonomy clone needs for its subject/level tree. The actual programme text remains in PDF (cycles 2/3/4, rentrée 2020) or DOCX/ODT/RTF/EPUB (seconde 2019, cycles 2015 versions) on data.gouv.fr, and legal instruments (socle décret, arrêtés-programmes) are structured only as legal XML/JSON via Légifrance's Piste API without the annexe content. So: structured layer for the tree = yes (ScoLOMFR+BCN); structured layer for the leaf content (attendus) = no, PDF/DOCX extraction is unavoidable.
gaps: No official or community JSON/CSV of the ACTUAL programme content (attendus de fin d'année, repères annuels, compétences détaillées) exists — every source stops at document formats. PDF/DOCX extraction is mandatory for the leaf content.

No structured version reflects the 2024-2025 français/maths reform (new cycle 1-2 programmes for rentrée 2025/2026): data.gouv.fr datasets are frozen at rentrée 2020, and ScoLOMFR encodes labels not the new attendus. The newest reform content is only on éduscol/BO as fresh PDFs.

ScoLOMFR gives competency/discipline/level vocabularies but the numbered SKOS files (~60) are not self-describing by subject in the listing — each RDF must be fetched to map notation→meaning; no single manifest CSV of 'which vocab = which nomenclature' was found in-repo (implied by ScoLOMFR nomenclature numbering doc on reseau-canope, which is 403 to bots).

The givingsense FrScol ontologies are the only source that structures programme CONTENT as data, but they are ~2014, cover only collège Histoire-Géo-EC, and predate all current programmes — unusable as current content.

data.education.gouv.fr opendata portal (ODS) surfaced no curriculum-content dataset (only statistics: results, staffing, TIMSS); its homepage is JS-rendered so a deeper API sweep (records API) was not exhausted — a residual chance of a nomenclature dataset there.

Réseau Canopé ScoLOMFR download/browser pages and the BCN portal are gated (403/404/behind pleiade.education.fr) to automated fetch; the GitLab mirror is the reliable machine path, but license terms (Licence Ouverte vs LOM licence) were not confirmed from the repo's license_lom.txt/lisezmoi files — must read before redistribution.

Légifrance Piste API can deliver the arrêtés fixant les programmes as structured legal XML/JSON, but confirming that any arrêté embeds the programme annexe as structured data (vs a PDF annexe reference) was not verified.

documents.title: ScoLOMFR Vocab — référentiel officiel de vocabulaires de l'Éducation nationale (SKOS/RDF, SKOS-XL, XML, BCN, HTML)
subjects: Toutes disciplines (référentiels transversaux: niveaux, disciplines, compétences)
documents.granularity: per-competency / per-concept codes: ~60 numbered SKOS vocabularies (RDF/XML), each a controlled list of concepts with skos:prefLabel, notation, broader/narrower hierarchy. Vocab 28 = compétences/champs disciplinaires; other vocabularies cover niveaux éducatifs, disciplines, diplômes, and specific programme vocabularies (e.g. programmes de français et mathématiques du cycle 3, éducation à la sexualité). This is the TAXONOMY SKELETON (subjects/levels/cycles/competency labels), NOT the full prose of attendus. Formats present: SKOS/, SKOS-XL/, SKOS-XL-Global/, XML/, HTML/, BCN/ (Base Centrale des Nomenclatures aligned files), plus DTD.
documents.notes: PRIMARY structured resource. Official, maintained by Réseau Canopé / DGESCO. Git repo created 2025-04-06, default branch main, public, versioned by git tags (v10.1, v11.0). Public API works: forge.apps.education.fr/api/v4/projects/vocabnomen%2Fscolomfr-vocab. Human portal: https://www.reseau-canope.fr/scolomfr/ (telechargements/browser pages return 403/404 to bots — use the GitLab repo instead). Machine-readable and directly ingestible for the taxonomy layer (marble os-taxonomy equivalent of subjects+grades+strands). Does NOT contain the enumerated attendus/repères text — those still require PDF extraction.

documents.title: Ontologies descriptives du système et des programmes scolaires français (givingsense.eu / FrScol)
subjects: Toutes disciplines (référentiels transversaux: niveaux, disciplines, compétences)
documents.granularity: OWL/XML ontologies: (1) ontologie du système scolaire, (2) ontologie générique de description d'un programme, (3) ontologie des compétences d'après Bloom, (4-7) ontologies détaillées des programmes d'Histoire-Géographie-Éducation civique de 6e/5e/4e/3e. The HG ontologies enumerate programme items as structured concepts — good extraction granularity but for OLD (pre-2016) programmes and only collège HG-EC.
documents.notes: Third-party academic (givingsense.eu). 7 XML resources hosted at http://givingsense.eu/frscol/ (host still responds, HTTP 303 redirect). OUTDATED — describes the 2008-era HG-EC collège programmes, not the current 2016/2020 cycles or the 2024-25 reforms. Useful as a data-modelling reference / proof-of-concept for structuring programmes, not as current content.

documents.title: Programmes d'enseignement de l'école élémentaire et du collège : cycles 2, 3 et 4 (data.gouv.fr)
documents.granularity: 6 resources but NOT truly structured: current programmes (rentrée 2020) are PDF only (3 files, one per cycle); older 2015 versions are epub/odt/rtf. Prose chapters with embedded competency tables. Machine-DISTRIBUTED but not machine-STRUCTURED — still needs PDF/odt extraction to enumerate attendus.
documents.bo_reference: BO spécial n°11 du 26-11-2015 (base) + arrêté 2020 (rentrée 2020 update)
documents.notes: Official ministry dataset but a document repository, not a dataset in the JSON/CSV sense. The odt/rtf/epub of the 2015 version are the most parseable machine formats (XML-based) if extraction of the older text is acceptable. Confirms: no official JSON/CSV of programme content exists here.

documents.title: Programmes d'enseignement de seconde générale et technologique à partir de 2019 (data.gouv.fr)
documents.granularity: 21 resources, mostly DOCX (one per discipline) + a few PDF. DOCX are OOXML (parseable) with headings/tables per programme — semi-structured, better extraction target than flat PDF. Still no per-competency codes; structure must be inferred from Word styles.
documents.bo_reference: Arrêtés du 17-01-2019 (NOR ENE19015xx), BO spécial n°1 du 22 janvier 2019
documents.notes: Official. DOCX-per-subject makes this the most extraction-friendly official programme dataset for lycée seconde. Files hosted on static.data.gouv.fr.

documents.granularity: 6 resources (document formats). EMC programme text; the older EMC programme was notably table-structured (connaissances/capacités/objets d'enseignement) which extracts into rows well, but distributed as documents not as a table dataset.
documents.bo_reference: BO 2015 (EMC) superseded by BO 2018/2024 revisions
documents.version_date: Needs verification — dataset may predate the 2024 EMC revision applicable rentrée 2025

documents.title: BCN — Base Centrale des Nomenclatures (niveaux, disciplines, MEF) — embedded in ScoLOMFR + data.education.gouv.fr
subjects: Toutes disciplines (référentiels transversaux: niveaux, disciplines, compétences)
documents.granularity: Reference nomenclatures as coded tables: niveaux de formation (N_NIVEAU_FORMATION_DIPLOME), disciplines, MEF (modules élémentaires de formation), matières d'enseignement. These are the official coded lists for levels and subjects — exactly the enum backbone. Available as XML/HTML in the ScoLOMFR repo BCN/ folder (scolomfr_bcn.xml, scolomfr-etendu_bcn.xml) and as downloadable tables on the BCN portal.
documents.notes: The BCN gives the authoritative code lists for grade levels and subjects (what marble os-taxonomy would key on). ScoLOMFR aligns to it (BCN/ folder in the GitLab repo, directly fetchable). BCN portal itself is behind pleiade.education.fr; the ScoLOMFR mirror is the easiest machine access.
documents.verification_note: Dead/decommissioned host: direct fetch failed with ECONNREFUSED (193.48.5.43:443). Confirmed via search that BCN has been migrated off the infocentre.pleiade.education.fr domain, which is being retired ('previous URL will soon no longer be available'). BCN (Base Centrale des Nomenclatures) itself is real and current; it now lives at bcn.depp.education.fr. Use the corrected URL.

documents.title: Socle commun de connaissances, de compétences et de culture — décret n°2015-372 (Légifrance)
subjects: Toutes disciplines (référentiels transversaux: niveaux, disciplines, compétences)
documents.granularity: Prose + 5 domains structured as an annexe. Légifrance offers it as HTML (article/annexe structure) and the Légifrance/DILA open API (Piste) exposes LODA/JORF texts as structured JSON/XML — so the socle decree IS retrievable in structured legal-XML form, but the content granularity is domain-level prose, not per-competency codes.
documents.notes: Légifrance API (Piste / DILA) gives arrêtés & décrets as structured JSON/XML — this is the structured path for the LEGAL instruments (arrêtés fixant les programmes) even though the programme ANNEXES are prose. The arrêtés-programmes reference their annexe content rather than encoding it as data.

segments.segment: Enseignements optionnels du lycée voie générale (DGEMC, maths complémentaires/expertes, LCA, LVC, arts, EPS) + Grand oral — gap-fill pass after completeness critic
segments.verification_verdict: solid (PDF URLs HTTP-200-checked by researching agent; Cloudflare-blocked BO HTML confirmed via Légifrance cross-reference)
subjects: Droit et grands enjeux du monde contemporain (DGEMC)
Langue vivante C (LVC) — enseignement optionnel de langue vivante étrangère/régionale
Éducation physique et sportive (EPS) — enseignement optionnel
segments.coverage_assessment: The optional layer of the voie générale is now fully mapped: DGEMC (corrected BO reference: arrêté 19-7-2019, BO spécial n°8 — the completeness critic's own citation was wrong), maths complémentaires (2019 in force + 2026 successor effective rentrée 2027), maths expertes (2019, no renewal), LCA latin/grec (separate 2nde+1re and Tle arrêtés), LVC (2025 programme phasing in through 2026-2027), a single arts arrêté covering all 7 disciplines, EPS optionnel, and the Grand oral framework note de service.
gaps: Mission brief error corrected: DGEMC terminale programme is arrêté du 19 juillet 2019 / BO spécial n°8 du 25 juillet 2019 (NOR MENE1921266A), NOT arrêté 17-1-2019 / BO spécial n°1 as stated in the task.

education.gouv.fr /bo/*.htm and /media/*/download URLs are Cloudflare-protected (HTTP 403 to both WebFetch and curl), so BO HTML pages could not be fetched directly; contents were confirmed via search snippets + Légifrance. All content was cross-verified, but the .htm BO URLs themselves were not directly rendered.
Direct annexe PDF for the LCA seconde/première optional programme (MENE1901579A) was not isolated — only the terminale LCA PDF (spe267) was confirmed.

Arts optional: no single small PDF for the framework programme was found; the confirmed PDF is the full 19 MB BO spécial n°1. Per-discipline éduscol PDFs exist but were not each individually verified. Note the yearly 'programmes limitatifs' (works studied) are separate texts (MENE2504603N for 2025-2026, MENE2536492N for 2026-2027).
EPS optional: the official ministry/éduscol annexe PDF is Cloudflare-blocked; an academy-hosted extract was used as pdf_url. The exact NOR of the 24 June 2021 (BO n°25) modification was not captured.

Two future/adopted-but-not-in-force replacements were identified and flagged: (1) new maths complémentaires programme arrêté 26 février 2026 (effective rentrée 2027); (2) new LV programme arrêté 5 mai 2025 becoming fully in force across the cycle terminal at rentrée 2026-2027. Maths expertes has NO 2026 renewal (still 2019).
Grand oral exact NOR references of the 13-02-2020 notes de service (général vs technologique) were not individually captured; only BO dates confirmed.

missing_items.segment: PREMIÈRE + TERMINALE voie générale — TRONC COMMUN / spécialités
missing_items.what: DGEMC (Droit et grands enjeux du monde contemporain) is entirely absent. It is a 3h enseignement optionnel offered ONLY in Terminale de la voie générale (arrêté 17-1-2019, BO spécial n°1 du 22-1-2019), one of the most recognizable Terminale-générale options. No segment mentions it, not even as excluded-by-scope. A French lycée teacher would immediately notice its absence.
missing_items.where_to_find: Programme de droit et grands enjeux du monde contemporain, classe terminale voie générale — arrêté 17-1-2019, BO spécial n°1 du 22 janvier 2019 (éduscol 'programmes et ressources DGEMC').

The whole optional layer is unmapped: LCA latin, LCA grec, LVC (langue vivante C), the artistic options (arts plastiques / cinéma-audiovisuel / danse / histoire des arts / musique / théâtre / arts du cirque), EPS optionnel, hippologie-équitation (agricole), plus maths complémentaires / maths expertes and DGEMC in Terminale. Only maths comp/expertes are acknowledged (as out-of-scope). These are part of the voie générale offer alongside the 3 spécialités + 2 spécialités.

completeness_review.overall_completeness: Strong and largely complete. All 15 grade levels (PS→Terminale) are covered, all 13 lycée spécialités are present and correctly named, the socle commun / attendus de fin d'année / repères annuels are correctly scoped (incl. the correct note that they don't apply to cycle 1 or lycée), and the recent reform chain (2024 cycle 1-2, 2025 cycle 3, 2026 cycle 4 français-maths; 2024 EMC; 2025-2026 EVAR/EVARS; 2026 LVE/EPS/HG/sciences-et-technologie phased reforms; 2026 maths seconde/terminale) is well tracked. The material gaps are concentrated in ONE area: the lycée voie générale OPTIONAL layer. The single most teacher-obvious omission is DGEMC (Terminale-générale option), entirely absent. Beyond that, the cycle-terminal enseignements optionnels (LCA latin/grec, LVC, arts options, EPS option, maths complémentaires/expertes, hippologie) are not mapped as a group. Secondary issues: a scope inconsistency on the voie technologique (horaires listed but no programmes; STAV missing), and minor absences (Grand oral framework, chorale facultatif, sections internationales/européennes/bilangue). The enseignement scientifique post-2023 revision flagged in the brief remains unresolved but is correctly noted as a follow-up.
